name: Rental Income PHC Exclusion

eligibility.description: Adjusted rent must be 50% or more of adjusted ordinary gross income, and other PHC income (dividends/interest) must be distributed as dividends to the extent it exceeds 10% of ordinary gross income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes adjusted income from rents from PHC income classification, avoiding the 20% PHC tax.
